# Does the Safety View handle skeptical scenarios adequately?

**Node Type:** antithesis
**Node ID:** e7c7d033-f26d-4dab-a06c-f610183ee391
**Depth:** 4
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Safety View](safety-view-synthesis-d338c240-3e1b-4946-a69a-5ba3a430c560.md)

## Content

**In a skeptical scenario, all beliefs could be false or generated by deceptive forces.**, **Intuitively in some skeptical scenarios, one could still have safe beliefs.**, **The notion of safety fails if every belief could be false in a skeptical scenario.**
